underlying_goal: Review GitHub issue #15 and ship pre-v1.18 patches addressing Codex TOML bugs, cross-platform installer parity, and platform change monitoring, then pause work with a handoff
friction_detail: Claude treated Codex JSON Schema as authoritative and created QT29 to remove the description field, requiring user pushback and a revert after checking Rust source; also incorrectly claimed local patches were invisible to the installer
brief_summary: User wanted to ship pre-v1.18 patches for Codex/parity issues and set up platform monitoring before pausing; three releases (v1.17.2–v1.17.4) shipped with test suite growing from 288 to 350, despite one reverted quick task.
